title: H-A2 narrow independent-validation paid-cost estimate plan preregistration
purpose: Pre-register the exact narrow Databento cost-estimate scope needed to test H-A2 independent validation gaps before any live metadata cost call, paid download, IBKR request, exact replay, paper trading, or E2 claim.
source_decision_summary: H-A2.36 concluded that no-paid sources can define the validation gap and regime requirements, but cannot add independent implementable SPY 0DTE PnL days. Retained OOS remains 14 trade days, high-VIX retained validation coverage is missing, and MinTRL/PSR acceptance remains unproven.

named_validation_gaps.reason: Current H-A2 evidence has already inspected 2024 OOS; later data is needed to reduce reuse of the current validation sample.
H-A2.34/H-A2.36 report no retained high-VIX validation bucket.
Future reports must compute MinTRL/PSR from the realized validation return distribution before any acceptance claim.

allowed_inputs.use: control the current validation gaps, cost guard, and next-action decision
record current cost guard and stop conditions before any future provider call
select high-VIX and control validation windows without provider calls
confirm macro labels are already available for proposed validation windows
reuse the existing request-window pattern for 09:35 entry, intraday checks, and forced close

forbidden_inputs.reason: This preregistration defines the estimate scope only; it must not call provider metadata.
Downloads require a later estimate result and a separate download decision.
The current plan is Databento-only under existing provider policy.
IBKR remains a separate externally blocked data path.
H-L1 remains blocked until real timestamp-clean news cases exist.
News capture remains blocked by its own cooldown/upstream response gate.
The cost plan must not become another OOS tuning pass.

candidate_estimate_batches.role: one-day metadata sanity check before estimating larger packs

required_fields.reason: Reconstruct auditable 09:35 entry bid/ask and implementable entry price.
Keep implementable PnL, stop/target checks, and 15:45 forced-close handling comparable to existing H-A2 artifacts.
Reconstruct the 09:35 signal and verify underlying context for candidate days.
Use already-local VIX/VXV and macro labels; do not buy news or LLM inputs for this H-A2 cost plan.

future_live_estimate_may_start_only_if: The latest paid-cost audit still reports status pass.
No new paid provider is introduced.
The future estimate command is metadata/cost-only and writes a report before any download.
future_download_forbidden_until: A live metadata cost estimate report exists for the selected batch.
Projected cost remains inside the active cost guard or the user tops up by real payment on the existing Databento account.
A separate download decision artifact names the selected batch and verifies the guard.
The download still serves H-A2 independent validation gaps without changing threshold 0.001 or adding an OOS-selected filter.

estimate_sequence_rules.second_step: Estimate high_vix_validation_pack only if the one-day estimate is small enough to keep projected usage inside the guard.
estimate_sequence_rules.third_step: Estimate control packs one at a time only after high-VIX estimate is understood.
never_estimate: LLM or news acquisition mixed into H-A2
stop_conditions: paid-cost audit status is not pass
any projected selected batch would breach the active cost guard
provider scope changes beyond Databento SPY
the estimate plan cannot preserve the locked 09:35 signal and threshold 0.001

allowed_claims: H-A2 has a pre-registered narrow paid-cost estimate plan.
The plan names exact independent validation windows, required fields, and cost guard prerequisites.
The plan may justify a future metadata-only cost estimate if validators and paid-cost audit pass.
The plan preserves the locked 09:35-only H-A2 signal and threshold 0.001.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not run exact replay from this preregistration.
Do not buy paid data from this preregistration.
Do not call live Databento estimates from this preregistration.
Do not request IBKR bars from this preregistration.
Do not call LLMs from this preregistration.
Do not retry GDELT from this preregistration.
Do not add a new OOS-selected filter.
Do not treat cost-estimate planning as validation evidence.
completion_criteria: The preregistration names exact windows before any live cost estimate.
The preregistration names required fields and provider datasets.
The preregistration records the current cost guard and future stop conditions.
The preregistration preserves the 09:35-only signal and threshold 0.001.
The preregistration forbids paid download, exact replay, paper trading, and E2 claims.
tier_blockers: No live metadata cost estimate yet
No independent validation PnL days added
